mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 5.5 percent signals labor market deterioration that triggers recession fears, causing immediate equity sell-offs over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 52 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal income combined with stable inflation indicates robust consumer purchasing power without monetary policy tightening, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to produce positive 60-day returns in over 55 percent of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: An accelerating industrial production index during a post-shock recovery phase confirms supply-side momentum that lifts short-term market sentiment and generates positive weekly returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 50 percent of accelerating INDPRO periods, or the signal shows zero predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts reflect expanding construction activity and rising household wealth, which consistently correlates with positive monthly S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Housing starts growth fails to predict positive 20-day returns with an accuracy above 53 percent across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index growth surpassing 3 percent forces central banks to accelerate rate hikes, compressing equity multiples and generating negative quarterly returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally with positive 60-day returns in over 60 percent of high-inflation trigger events, invalidating the discount rate compression mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market that supports corporate earnings and drives positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined payroll and unemployment signal yields negative 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of occurrences, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter decline in real GDP during a late-cycle expansion confirms economic contraction that overrides monetary support and produces negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: GDP contraction periods produce positive 60-day equity returns in over 60 percent of cases, or the signal fails to separate bull and bear market outcomes.
